summary: Tested new Estate Health analytics tab on Admin Founder Dashboard. All 8 features verified working: Backend API returns correct summary/estates structure with health metrics, Frontend renders KPI cards, health distribution bar, filter buttons, expandable estate cards with mini family trees showing benefactor->beneficiaries with health-status badges and circular score rings.
critical_code_review_comments: EstateHealthTab.js: Clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Admin route /api/admin/estate-health: Returns well-structured summary with rates as percentages (0-100) and estates array sorted by health status (critical first)
ScoreRing component: Properly uses SVG with circular progress, color changes based on score (>=80 green, >=50 yellow, <50 red)
EstateHealthCard: Collapsible cards with mini family tree showing owner node at top, beneficiary nodes below with status badges
Health score calculation: Properly weights linking (30%), completion (30%), invitations (20%), and primary designation (20%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Estate Health tab fully verified. Tab accessible at /admin/estate-health. Uses data-testid='estate-health-tab' for container, 'health-kpi-*' for KPI cards, 'health-filter-*' for filter buttons, 'estate-health-toggle-*' for estate cards. Backend endpoint GET /api/admin/estate-health returns {summary: {...}, estates: [...]} with health_score (0-100) and health_status (healthy/attention/critical) for each estate.

verified_features.backend_api_estate_health_endpoint: PASS - Returns 200 with summary and estates array
verified_features.backend_api_summary_structure: PASS - Contains total_estates, linking_rate, completion_rate, primary_designated_rate, invitation_rate, healthy_estates, attention_estates, critical_estates
verified_features.backend_api_estate_structure: PASS - Each estate has estate_id, estate_name, owner, beneficiaries, metrics with health_score and health_status
verified_features.frontend_kpi_cards: PASS - 6 KPI cards: Total Estates (51), Linking Rate (0%), Completion (30.4%), Primary Set (3.9%), Invite Rate (8.7%), Total Bens (46)
verified_features.frontend_health_distribution_bar: PASS - Shows healthy/attention/critical counts with colored segments
verified_features.frontend_filter_buttons: PASS - All Estates, Critical (16), Attention (35), Healthy (0) - filters correctly
verified_features.frontend_estate_cards_expandable: PASS - 51 estate cards found, expand on click to show mini family tree
verified_features.frontend_mini_family_tree: PASS - Shows owner node (gold) at top, beneficiary nodes below with status badges (linked/invited/pending/incomplete)
verified_features.frontend_score_ring: PASS - Circular SVG progress with correct colors (red for critical, yellow for attention, green for healthy)
verified_features.frontend_health_status_badge: PASS - Critical/Attention/Healthy badges with correct coloring
verified_features.frontend_admin_tab_navigation: PASS - Estate Health tab with HeartPulse icon in admin nav tabs
